title: DRW MD-DRW-519: Gimbal Mount Detail
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-519 Rev D — Gimbal Mount Detail

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
